title: crispy pungent mediterranean oats hash
description: a hearty, wholesome breakfast dish with a crispy exterior and a pungent, savory interior.
instructions: in a large bowl, whisk together the oats, eggs, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
in a large pan over medium heat, cook the mixed mushrooms and red onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the cooked mushroom mixture to the bowl with the oat mixture and stir to combine.
transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with crumbled feta cheese and chopped parsley.
bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, until the top is golden brown and crispy.
remove from the oven and top with sliced kalamata olives.
return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes, until the olives are caramelized.
remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
